title: elatostema sessile var. brongniartianum
intro: Elatostema sessile var. brongniartianum, also known as Brongniart's Elatostema, is a variety of the Elatostema sessile plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Elatostema sessile var. brongniartianum include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water or by using it in traditional remedies such as teas, tinctures, and poultices.
